name: Tuesday Night Titans
overview: Hosts Vince McMahon and Lord Alfred Hayes welcome the popular WWE Superstars and feature entertaining segments in WWE's original talk show.

trailers.title: Lanny Poffo reads a poem dedicated to Hulk Hogan: Tuesday Night Titans, Oct. 18, 1985
Mr. McMahon interviews the legendary Lou Thesz: Tuesday Night Titans, June 26, 1984
